title: ChestPunch
description: Puts the item you're holding in a chest when you punch it.
body:
# ChestPunch

Have you ever wanted to be able to put an item bothering your hotbar in a chest quickly? I have.
Punch a chest (or dispenser, dropper, hopper, barrel) to put put the item you're holding in the chest!

Toggle this feature with
`/chestpunch`

Uses the permission `chestpunch.use`, which should be enabled by default!
